creator: ade@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: portmgr->ports

Since the current ORBacus port is (a) horrendously outdated and 
(b) has no other ports depending on it, I think the repocopy is overkill, 
and the port should simply be updated as-is. 

Therefore, back to ports@ for a ports committer to deal with it.
